latestHandover: Audit fully enriched with live az CLI and gh CLI evidence (2026-03-16). 12 findings: 1C/4H/5M/1L. Key context: vault.yaml injects AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET from k8s secret vault-azure-kms (NOT plaintext values) but vault-azure-kms has no VSO sync (STORE-01). Unseal key vault-unseal has rotationPolicy=null (SEC-03). allowSharedKeyAccess=true on storage account (SEC-04). All live Azure IDs embedded in recommendations.json tasks. Phase 1 must start with SEC-02 Workload Identity Federation eval + STORE-01 VSO-manage before any Terraform work. Supabase row: review_due_date 2026-06-16.

sessionHistory.summary: Initial audit. Identified 7 findings from receptor-infra repo inspection. Created feature branch, wrote audit.md and recommendations.json.

Enriched with live az CLI data. Added SEC-01 (KV network ACLs) and SEC-02 (SP client secret). Confirmed all resource identifiers. Discovered ARM template has 3 discrepancies from live state. Upgraded SEC-02 to Critical.

Iterative improvement round 1. Read values/vault.yaml via gh CLI — confirmed AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET injected from vault-azure-kms k8s secret (NOT plaintext). vault-azure-kms has no VSO sync (STORE-01, new High finding). Confirmed unseal key rotationPolicy=null (SEC-03, new Medium). Confirmed allowSharedKeyAccess=true (SEC-04, new Medium, with robust two-step remediation requiring consumer pre-flight audit). Set Supabase review_due_date to 2026-06-16. Total: 12 findings.
